word: G2289 - θανατόω - thanatóō - than-at-o'-o - Become dead

sections.paragraph:
- Original: θανατόω

- Transliteration: Thanatoo

- Phonetic: than-at-o'-o

- Definition:

1. to put to death

2. metaph.

a. to make to die i.e. destroy, render extinct

b. by death to be liberated from the bond of anything, literally to be made dead in relation to (something)

- Origin: from G2288

- TDNT entry: 03:21,3

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G2288; to kill (literally or figuratively): - become dead (cause to be) put to death kill mortify.
